items.risk: Cold-start marketplace: мало работодателей без кандидатов и мало кандидатов без вакансий.
items.mitigation: Start with concierge matching, narrow primary segment, manual supply seeding.
items.trigger: Applications per active job below 3 in S5

items.risk: Фейковые вакансии, мошенничество, сбор персональных данных под видом найма.
items.mitigation: Employer verification, moderation, abuse reports, audit logs, unsafe-contact warnings.

items.risk: Нарушение privacy/GDPR-like expectations при обработке CV and candidate data.
items.mitigation: Consent, export, deletion, retention windows, legal review before scale.

items.risk: AI matching perceived as discriminatory or authoritative.
items.mitigation: AI advisory label, human review, explainability logs, opt-out for automated suggestions.

items.risk: Платные каналы привлекают кандидатов, но не работодателей.
items.mitigation: Employer-first channel KPI; stop rules per channel.
items.trigger: Employer lead cost above 35 EUR in S7

items.risk: Существующая заготовка содержит случайную архитектуру и мешает delivery.
items.mitigation: S1 recovery classification; discard accidental code when cheaper.
items.trigger: More than 30 percent files unclassified after S1

items.risk: Production opened by mistake after technical success.
items.mitigation: Dangerous-action gates and proof JSON require production_accepted=false until S8 operator gate.
items.trigger: Any artifact claims production accepted before S8
